comments.author: derek
comments.text: Started work. Reproducing current behavior and patching RemoveSpeakerIdentifiersTranscriptFilter to remove complete speaker labels (e.g., 'Speaker 0:'), not just numeric tokens.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Implemented fix in RemoveSpeakerIdentifiersTranscriptFilter: replaced old single-token label regex with a speaker-aware pattern that strips full labels like 'Speaker 0:', 'Speaker A:', 'Agent:', 'Customer:', etc., then normalizes spacing. Added unit tests in plexus/processors/RemoveSpeakerIdentifiersTranscriptFilter_test.py including a Deepgram-style 'Speaker N:' reproduction case.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Validation: pytest could not run in this environment because importing plexus.processors pulls RelevantWindowsTranscriptFilter which requires missing dependency 'nltk'. Performed direct regex sanity checks locally and confirmed expected outputs for Speaker-number and Agent/Customer samples.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: User approved importing dependencies. Installing missing test dependency and rerunning processor tests for validation.
